summary.intent: Modernize the Moltis website homepage to showcase all supported AI providers/LLMs with visual pills (inspired by Polyphony), add missing content sections (positioning, how-it-works, use cases, social proof), and propagate all changes to all locale files.
summary.outcome: Added a 'Works with your stack' pills section with 4 categorized rows and official brand icons, added positioning/how-it-works/use-cases/community-quote sections, extracted CSS to style.css, updated hero title/tagline, fixed LoC stats, and propagated all changes to all locale HTML files via the i18n build script.

repo: The i18n system uses website/scripts/build-i18n.mjs to generate locale files from index.en.html via string substitution — new sections appear in English until translations are added to the script
French (index.fr.html) was NOT included in build-i18n.mjs and was manually maintained — it was missing all new sections until explicitly added
The build script has separate 'title' and 'metaDesc' fields per language that are distinct from the string replacement pairs — both must be updated when rebranding
Raster icon files (webp, png) need a separate CSS class (pill-icon-color) to avoid the dark-mode invert filter that works for monochrome SVGs
tokei reports: Rust code is ~215,683 lines total; moltis-agents core is ~11K LoC

code.finding: Each language entry has 'title', 'metaDesc', and 'strings' array — title/metaDesc are used for <title> and OG tags directly, strings array does find/replace on body content. French locale was completely absent.
New file extracted from inline <style> in index.en.html; contains pill glassmorphism styles, pill-icon/pill-icon-color classes, and scroll-reveal animation
23 icon files created: SVGs for most providers (Simple Icons or official brand SVGs), raster images for LM Studio (.webp) and MiniMax (.png) which needed separate CSS treatment

workflow: Simple Icons (simpleicons.org) is the authoritative source for brand SVGs at small sizes — always check there before crafting custom icons
Inline SVGs should be extracted to individual files in an icons/ directory for maintainability — easier to fix/replace individual broken icons
When using for icons instead of inline SVG, currentColor doesn't work — need CSS filter:invert(1) for dark mode on monochrome icons, and a separate no-invert class for colored raster logos
Raster wordmark logos need to be cropped to icon-only before use in pills — the MiniMax logo included text that needed trimming
Dev server should be started in background and cleaned up after screenshot verification

friction: French locale was silently excluded from build-i18n.mjs — changes to all other locales via the build script didn't affect French, causing visible regression only discovered when user navigated to the French URL

The build script's 'title'/'metaDesc' fields per language are separate from the string replacement pairs — updating the English template strings wasn't enough; each language's title/metaDesc had to be updated individually (8 separate edits)
Multiple background dev server task notifications arrived mid-session requiring read-output responses that added noise
Several SVG icons were initially broken or placeholder quality (Teams, DeepSeek, Cerebras) requiring iterative replacements
MiniMax logo included full wordmark text — required image cropping before it was usable as a pill icon
The pills section position changed mid-session (moved after value prop cards) requiring a cut-and-paste HTML restructure
open_items: All new homepage sections (positioning paragraph, how-it-works, use cases grid, community quote) are English-only in non-English locale files — translations need to be added to build-i18n.mjs strings arrays
LM Studio has no official SVG — using a generic monitor icon; should be replaced if they publish an SVG asset
MiniMax, Z.AI, and Venice pills have no icons (text-only) — official SVGs not found at time of implementation
Changes only propagated to index.en.html — other locale files (index.fr.html etc.) show new content in English; proper localization deferred
Social proof section has only one community quote (Noita) — more quotes/testimonials should be added as they accumulate
PR #567 was created but not merged — locale propagation and content changes still in review
